findings.description: Repeated institutional header/footer content inserted between page-equivalent content sections in the HTML, disrupting reading order.
findings.evidence: In the HTML, after the initial letterhead rendering (NC logo, PAT McCRORY/Governor, DONALD R. VAN DER VAART/Secretary, TRACY DAVIS/Director), footer text and a colored bar appear, followed by a second block repeating 'Energy, Mineral & Land Resources', 'ENVIRONMENTAL QUALITY', and the same governor/secretary/director names before the MEMORANDUM heading. This duplication does not exist in the PDF.

findings.description: Repeated institutional header block and footer text inserted between the 'I. History/Background' section heading and its body content in the HTML flow.
findings.evidence: In the HTML, after the 'I. History/Background' heading, there is a large blank space, footer text, a colored bar, and then the full institutional header block (Energy, Mineral & Land Resources, PAT McCRORY, etc.) before the actual CAMA content begins. In the PDF, the heading leads directly into the content without interruption.

findings.description: Repeated institutional header block inserted between Section I content and Section II content in the HTML flow.
findings.evidence: In the HTML rendering, the institutional header block (Energy, Mineral & Land Resources, ENVIRONMENTAL QUALITY, governor/secretary/director names) with colored bar and footer text appears again between the end of History/Background bullet points and the beginning of Section II meeting details, interrupting the continuous reading flow that exists in the PDF.

findings.description: A spurious image element is inserted at the beginning of Section I (History/Background) that has no corresponding substantive image in the PDF at that location. This likely represents a duplicated page header/border element from PDF page 2 that was incorrectly captured and placed in the body flow.
findings.evidence:
HTML contains immediately after the

I. History/Background

heading. PDF page 2 has no substantive image at that location—only body text beginning with 'Under the historic Coal Ash Management Act...'
